documents.title: Documents
documents.dragDrop: Drop your invoices here or click to upload

marketing.heroSubtitle: Upload invoices or receipts and see how Charmy extracts financial data instantly.
marketing.problemTitle: Accounting teams waste hours <1>entering invoice data.</1>
marketing.problemDesc: Businesses and accountants receive piles of invoices and receipts that must be opened, read, and typed manually into accounting systems. This repetitive work wastes valuable time.
marketing.solutionDesc: Upload invoices or forward them by email. Charmy reads the documents and extracts structured financial data automatically.
marketing.howItWorksDesc: Four steps from document to structured accounting data.
marketing.step1Desc: Upload invoices or forward them to your unique Charmy email address.
marketing.step2Desc: AI reads and extracts all financial data fields automatically.
marketing.step3Desc: Confirm the extracted fields. Edit anything that needs correction.
marketing.step4Desc: Export structured, accountant-ready CSV files in one click.
marketing.everyFieldDesc: Charmy extracts the data your accountant needs — no manual entry required.
marketing.firmSectionDesc: Accounting firms often receive invoices and receipts from many different client companies. Charmy allows you to create a separate workspace for each client so documents stay organized and easy to manage.
marketing.firmSectionDesc2: Accountants can switch between companies instantly and export financial data for each client independently.
marketing.firmBenefit1Title: Create a workspace for every client company
marketing.firmBenefit1Desc: Keep invoices, receipts, and financial documents separated.
marketing.firmBenefit2Desc: Move between companies without logging in and out.
marketing.firmBenefit3Title: Export clean data for each client
marketing.firmBenefit3Desc: Prepare organized financial records for accounting.
marketing.firmNote: The Accounting Firm plan allows you to manage up to 10 client workspaces from one Charmy account.
marketing.benefit3: Import documents by upload or email
marketing.installDesc: No app store needed. Add Charmy to your home screen or desktop for instant access, offline support, and a native app experience.
marketing.footerDesc: AI-powered financial document processing for modern businesses.

features.heroTitle: Everything you need to process invoices <1>automatically</1>
features.heroDesc: Charmy converts invoices and receipts into structured financial data using AI.
features.uploadDesc: Drag and drop PDF, JPG, or PNG files. Upload invoices, receipts, and supplier bills directly to Charmy.
features.uploadCap3: Support for PDF, JPG, and PNG
features.emailDesc: Forward supplier invoices directly to your Charmy email address. The system automatically imports attachments and processes them.
features.emailCap1: Dedicated email address for your workspace
features.aiDesc: Charmy extracts supplier, invoice number, VAT, totals, currency, and dates from your documents automatically.
features.reviewDesc: Verify extracted data quickly with document preview. Process many invoices quickly with a clean review interface.
features.catDesc: Create rules to categorize expenses automatically. Search, filter, and manage your entire document history.
features.catCap3: Filter by supplier, date, amount, or status
features.exportDesc: Export expenses and income data to CSV, Excel, or PDF. One-click export of accountant-ready reports.
features.firmSectionDesc: If you're an accountant or bookkeeper managing invoices for multiple clients, the Accounting Firm plan lets you create separate workspaces per company — all managed from one account.
features.firmCap1Desc: Create a workspace for each client. Documents, expenses, and exports are fully isolated per company.
features.firmCap2Desc: Invite team members and assign them to specific client workspaces based on their role.
features.firmCap3Desc: Move between client workspaces instantly from the sidebar — no need to log in and out.
features.firmCap4Desc: Export financial data, invoices, and reports separately for each company.
features.learnAboutFirm: Learn about the Accounting Firm plan

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heroDesc: Let Charmy process your invoices automatically so you can focus on more important work.
pricing.proDesc: Everything you need to process invoices and manage expenses effortlessly.
pricing.firmDesc: For accountants and bookkeeping firms. Manage up to 10 client companies from one account.
pricing.whyAccountantsDesc1: Accountants often receive piles of invoices from multiple clients. Instead of chasing files across emails, folders, and spreadsheets — process client invoices in dedicated workspaces and export clean financial data faster.
pricing.whyAccountantsDesc2: The Accounting Firm plan is a one-time purchase of €99 that gives you access to up to 10 client workspaces inside Charmy. Each workspace keeps documents fully separated, searchable, and ready to export.
pricing.whyAccountantsNote: Ideal for firms managing documents for multiple clients from one central platform.
pricing.firmFaqDesc: Everything you need to know about managing multiple client workspaces.
pricing.generalFaqDesc: Everything you need to know about Charmy's pricing and plans.

faq.title: Frequently Asked <1>Questions</1>
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about Charmy and AI invoice processing.
faq.q1: Can I try Charmy before creating an account?
faq.a1: Yes. You can try Charmy instantly on our homepage by uploading an invoice or receipt. The demo lets you see exactly how Charmy extracts financial data from documents before you sign up. No account required.
faq.q2: What types of documents can Charmy process?
faq.a2: Charmy supports the most common financial document formats including PDF invoices, JPG images, PNG images, and scanned receipts. You can upload files manually or send them via email.
faq.q3: Can I send invoices by email instead of uploading them?
faq.a3: Yes. Every Charmy workspace includes a dedicated email address where you can forward invoices. When an invoice arrives, Charmy automatically imports the document, reads the invoice, extracts financial data, and adds it to your workspace. This is perfect for supplier invoices that arrive in your inbox.
faq.q4: What information does Charmy extract from invoices?
faq.a4: Charmy automatically extracts key financial fields including supplier name, invoice number, invoice date, currency, subtotal, VAT amount, and total amount. You can review and edit the data before exporting it.
faq.a5: Charmy is designed for professionals who deal with invoices regularly — accountants and bookkeepers, small businesses, freelancers and consultants, and finance teams. It eliminates hours of manual invoice data entry.
faq.q6: How accurate is the AI extraction?
faq.a6: Charmy uses advanced AI document processing models trained to recognize financial document structures. In most cases, invoice fields are extracted automatically and require minimal review. You always have the option to edit extracted data before exporting it.
faq.a7: Yes. Charmy processes documents using secure infrastructure and encrypted connections. Security measures include encrypted data transfer (SSL), secure cloud infrastructure, and GDPR-compliant data handling. Your documents are only accessible to your account.
faq.q8: Can I organize and categorize expenses?
faq.a8: Yes. Charmy allows you to categorize invoices and create automatic rules based on supplier names or document data. For example: Supplier contains "AWS" → Category: Cloud Services. This helps automate expense organization.
faq.q9: Can I export my data for accounting?
faq.a9: Yes. Charmy lets you export financial data into formats suitable for accountants, including CSV, spreadsheet formats, and structured financial reports. This makes it easy to share data with your accountant or import it into accounting software.
faq.q10: Do I need accounting software to use Charmy?
faq.a10: No. Charmy focuses specifically on document processing and financial data extraction. Many businesses use Charmy to prepare organized financial data before sending it to their accountant.
